chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3632 - وَ رَوَى إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : "لاَ تَتَعَرَّضُوا لِلْحُقُوقِ، فَإِذَا لَزِمَتْكُمْ فَاصْبِرُوا لَهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3632 - Isma'il bin Jabir narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said:
"Do not expose yourselves to obligations, but if they become binding upon you, then be patient with them."
